title: proyectos
description: Una muestra de mi trayectoria full-stack — desde experiencias front-end responsivas hasta soluciones back-end escalables. Cada proyecto representa mi pasión por el código limpio y la resolución innovadora de problemas.

projects.title: Comunidad Deportiva
projects.description: interactive web platform for showcasing athletes, using a 3D map as the main interface. The project included everything from design conception to full front-end implementation, integrating multimedia information (photos, biographies, etc.) and optimizing for a smooth user experience.

projects.title: Devtab, developer's new tab
projects.description: A browser extension that transforms your new tab page into a developer-friendly dashboard. Devtab offers quick access to coding resources, productivity tools, and inspirational quotes, making it the perfect companion for developers.

projects.title: Photography Portfolio
projects.description: A minimalist photography portfolio designed to showcase the beauty of simplicity. The project features a clean, responsive layout that puts the focus on the stunning visuals, making it the perfect platform for photographers to display their work.

projects.title: Tourist
projects.description: A work-in-progress tourism application designed to assist travelers with route planning and provide relevant information along the journey. Tourist aims to be the perfect companion for exploring new destinations.

projects.title: Ticketery
projects.description: A comprehensive full-stack web application for event ticket sales. Ticketery includes features like user management, refund processing, email integration, and advanced sales functionalities, making it the ultimate ticketing solution.

projects.title: Librarian
projects.description: A desktop application built with web technologies for managing book collections. Librarian offers an intuitive interface to add, edit, and organize books, authors, and categories, making it an essential tool for book enthusiasts and libraries alike.

projects.title: Fluent VSCode
projects.description: This page was created as an interpretation of the Fluent Design concept applied to Visual Studio Code, inspired by this video by @duckc. Explore how Microsoft's fluid design style can transform the look and functionality of VS Code, providing a more modern and engaging visual experience.

projects.title: Sneakers landing page
projects.description: A responsive landing page for a fictional sneaker brand, featuring a clean design and smooth animations. The project showcases my front-end skills and attention to detail, with a focus on creating an engaging user experience.

projects.title: Doomdraw
projects.description: A straightforward digital sketchbook designed for basic sketching and creative exploration. Doomdraw prioritizes simplicity, offering a clutter-free space for your ideas to take shape.

projects.title: Doomguy
projects.description: A lightweight, no-frills alternative to bloated postman applications. Doomguy focuses on simplicity and efficiency, providing only the essential tools needed for testing and managing APIs seamlessly.

projects.title: Velouria
projects.description: A modern, minimalist blog theme designed to showcase your content in style. Velouria offers a clean, responsive layout that puts the focus on your writing, making it the perfect choice for bloggers who want to stand out.

projects.title: Scheduler
projects.description: An ultra-minimalistic scheduling tool tailored for students. Scheduler helps users stay organized with an effortless design that keeps distractions to a minimum while ensuring productivity.

projects.title: React-Notifications
projects.description: A customizable React notification library built to be easy to use and open to contributions. React-Notifications focuses on delivering a flexible system that meets the diverse needs of developers and invites community-driven improvements.

projects.title: Sort Visualizer
projects.description: A visual sorting algorithm demonstration tool designed to help users understand the inner workings of sorting algorithms. Sort Visualizer offers an interactive experience that makes learning fun and engaging.
